action.reasoning: Observation: Starting fresh with no prior runs. Analysis: Need to quickly establish an end-to-end baseline using a strong pretrained model, standard label smoothing, RandAugment, and cosine LR to handle noisy CIFAR-100N labels. A short 5-epoch run on ConvNeXt Tiny will validate the pipeline and measure iteration time. Decision: Write model.py, train.py, predict.py; train 5 epochs; test predict.py locally with a fallback to val.pt; then submit eval.
action.command: python train.py --epochs 5 --batch_size 128 --model convnext_tiny && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/best_convnext_tiny.pt --output /tmp/local_test_pred.json
